functions.name: entity_count
functions.description: Returns the number of entities/tables in the data package

functions.name: entity_names
functions.description: Returns a comma-separated list of entity names

functions.name: field_count
functions.description: Returns the number of fields for a given entity

functions.name: field_names
functions.description: Returns a comma-separated list of field names for a given entity

functions.name: field_type
functions.description: Returns the data type of a specific field

functions.name: row_count
functions.description: Returns the number of rows for a given entity

functions.name: sample_values
functions.description: Returns a few example values for a field
